title: VS Safe and Sound
description: Catching all exceptions in the VS physics thread, preventing VS phys thread crashes.
body:
Ever encountered errors like "!!!!VS PHYS THREAD CRASH!!!!" or "Too many frames in queue, is game stage broken?" in single-player or multiplayer? These often cause game laggy, making it nearly impossible to place blocks or shipfy blocks.

**No worries! VS Safe and Sound** is here to fix it. This mod catches potential crashes within the physics thread, including **invalid forces/torques**, **unexpected constraint updates**, and more.
![Catch invalid force](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec5f76889b10510ae9a20db0c5044d991aa6094f.png)
The mod has been tested on several Forge servers and a single-player Forge modpack—everything works smoothly. While a Fabric version exists, it hasn't been field-tested yet. Any feedback is welcomed!

Additionally, sometimes removing VS addons prevents world loading. This mod can also handle it. It skips leftover addon data during save loading.
![Catch leftover VS addon data](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a902e6e3fea979d72d2b5f585e82feafd6d3d6f1.png)
